# BP-162 negative: the parallel test uses isolated local state.
lang: go
file: BP-162-safe_test.go
variant: isolated-parallel-state
---
package sample

import "testing"

var sharedResults = map[string]int{}

func TestParallelUsesLocalState(t *testing.T) {
	t.Parallel()
	localResults := map[string]int{}
	localResults["ready"] = 1
}
